name: White Wine Mold
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix sugar and gelatin in a 3-quart saucepan.
2. Stir in wine, orange juice concentrate, water, and lemon juice.
3. Heat to boiling, stirring constantly.
4. Boil and stir for 1 minute.
5. Remove from heat and stir in lemon peel.
6. Refrigerate until the mixture mounds slightly when dropped from a spoon (about 2 1/2 hours).
7. Fold chilled gelatin mixture into whipped cream.
8. Pour into a 7-cup mold.
9. Refrigerate until firm, about 12 hours.
10. Unmold and garnish with orange slices.
